SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-01-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-06-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT COPY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOEL NITR0N GLOBAL INC. $2,418.38 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,458.38, IF THE $400 CHECK DEFT GAVE TO PLFT ON 12/4/96 IS GOOD, PLFT MUST CREDIT THIS AMT AGAINST JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
